title: Wholesome Nutrition
description: Prepared using the traditional bilona method, our Gir Cow Ghee retains natural vitamins, good fats, and antioxidants that support digestion, immunity, and daily nourishment.

title: Authentic Purity
description: Made from milk sourced from certified, controlled farms with full batch traceability. No blending, no additives, only genuine ghee produced with honesty at the source.

title: Rich Flavor & Aroma
description: Slow-cooked in small batches to preserve its natural grain, aroma, and nutty taste qualities that are lost in high-speed industrial processing.

title: Supporting Farmers
description: Produced using real milk economics, making sure fair value for responsible farmers who follow traditional and ethical dairy practices.
